grade_evidence.disclaimer: Heuristic radiographic score. NOT a histological grade.

overall_confidence.action_recommendation: Findings are well-supported by classifier and segmentation evidence.

explanation.summary: Automated detection of a 595 mm^2 lesion in the right hemisphere, parietal lobe (approx.). Radiographic grade-evidence band: intermediate (mixed features); overall model confidence high (0.83).
explanation.impression: Automated detection of a 595 mm^2 lesion in the right hemisphere, parietal lobe (approx.). Radiographic grade-evidence band: intermediate (mixed features); overall model confidence high (0.83).

findings.geometry: Area = 595 pixels (595 mm^2). Equivalent diameter is 27.5 pixels. Shape is moderately elongated (eccentricity 0.63). The boundary is irregular (solidity 0.46, < 0.85 indicates concavities).
findings.localization: Right- vs left-hemisphere centroid places this in the right hemisphere. Vertically, the centroid is in the middle (central) third of the brain. Heuristic quadrant suggests parietal lobe (approx.). The mass is deep / subcortical.
findings.intensity: On channel R, the tumor is hyperintense relative to surrounding brain (mean 92.0 vs background 72.2). On channel G, the tumor is hyperintense relative to surrounding brain (mean 92.0 vs background 72.2). On channel B, the tumor is hyperintense relative to surrounding brain (mean 92.0 vs background 72.2).
findings.texture: Heterogeneity score = 0.31 (moderate). Shannon entropy = 6.28. GLCM contrast = 0.86.
findings.morphology_margins: Border definition: ill-defined / infiltrative (border gradient 98.1 vs brain-average gradient 111.8, relative 0.88). Internal intensity zones detected by k-means: 3 (centers at 79, 95, 130).
findings.internal_architecture: Necrosis-like fraction (single-channel) = 0.07 of pixels in the tumor are markedly darker than the tumor median. Values >0.20 are suggestive of a necrotic core. Rim vs core intensity ratio = 1.08; pattern: homogeneous (rim ~ core). 1 hyperdense focus(es) (>P95) inside the tumor; can suggest haemorrhage or coarse calcification depending on modality. 1 hypodense focus(es) (<P5) inside the tumor; can suggest cystic / necrotic foci.
findings.mass_effect: Tumor-to-brain area ratio = 0.040. Brain bilateral symmetry IoU (left vs horizontally-mirrored right) = 0.86 (1.0 = perfectly symmetric). Mass effect evidence: no significant mass effect indicators.

differential_diagnosis_hints: Multifocal disease (e.g. metastatic disease, multifocal glioma, lymphoma) - 3 discrete components on segmentation.
Infiltrative mass (e.g. infiltrative glioma) - irregular shape with concavities and elongated profile is more typical of an infiltrative lesion than a well-circumscribed one.

differential_with_citations.statement: Multifocal disease (e.g. metastatic disease, multifocal glioma, lymphoma) - 3 discrete components on segmentation.
Infiltrative mass (e.g. infiltrative glioma) - irregular shape with concavities and elongated profile is more typical of an infiltrative lesion than a well-circumscribed one.

explanation.grade_evidence_narrative:
Radiographic grade-evidence score = 0.44 of 1.00 (intermediate (mixed features)).
  - necrosis: value=0.26 (weight 0.25). Driver: necrosis_like_fraction=0.07.
  - heterogeneity: value=0.81 (weight 0.20). Driver: heterogeneity_score=0.31, intensity_zones=3.
  - irregular_margin: value=1.00 (weight 0.15). Driver: solidity=0.46, circularity=0.23.
  - mass_effect: value=0.00 (weight 0.15). Driver: label="no significant mass effect indicators".
  - volume: value=0.12 (weight 0.10). Driver: area_px=595.
  - peritumoral_edema: value=0.00 (weight 0.10). Driver: edema_likely=False.
  - multifocality: value=1.00 (weight 0.05). Driver: n_components=3, multifocal=True.
(Heuristic radiographic score. NOT a histological grade.)
explanation.model_agreement_analysis: Per-model tumor probability: cnn=0.947, transfer=0.943, vit=0.997. Mean = 0.962. Models agreement: consistent.
explanation.confidence_assessment: Overall confidence band: high (score = 0.83 of 1.00). Recommended action: Findings are well-supported by classifier and segmentation evidence.. Grad-CAM peak aligns with the segmentation centroid (distance 5 px, IoU 0.08); classifier and segmenter agree on the same region.
explanation.recommendation: Findings are well-supported by classifier and segmentation evidence.
explanation.disclaimer: This is an automated, research-grade output from a deep-learning system. It is NOT a clinical diagnosis. All findings must be reviewed by a qualified radiologist before any decision is made.
